        font-size: 0.78rem;
        font-weight: 800;
        color: var(--text-primary);
        margin-bottom: 8px;
      }
      .tag-popover-input-row {
        display: flex;
        gap: 6px;
        margin-bottom: 8px;
      }
      #tagPopoverInput {
        flex: 1;
        padding: 6px 10px;
        border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
        border-radius: 6px;
        font-size: 0.8rem;
        background: var(--bg-input);
        color: var(--text-primary);
        outline: none;
      }
      #tagPopoverInput:focus {
        border-color: var(--color-primary);
      }
      .tag-popover-add-btn {
        padding: 6px 10px;
        border: none;
        border-radius: 6px;
        background: var(--color-primary);
        color: #fff;
        font-size: 0.78rem;
        font-weight: 700;
        cursor: pointer;
        white-space: nowrap;
      }
      .tag-popover-add-btn:hover {
        background: var(--color-primary-hover);
      }
      .tag-popover-list {
        display: flex;
        flex-wrap: wrap;
        gap: 5px;
        margin-bottom: 8px;
      }
      .tag-popover-chip {
        display: inline-flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: 4px;
        font-size: 0.74rem;
        font-weight: 600;
        padding: 4px 8px;
        border-radius: 999px;
        background: rgba(122, 1, 1, 0.08);
        color: var(--color-primary);
        cursor: default;
      }
      .tag-popover-chip button {
        background: none;
        border: none;
        color: inherit;
        cursor: pointer;
        font-size: 11px;
        padding: 0;
        opacity: 0.6;
        line-height: 1;
      }
      .tag-popover-chip button:hover {
        opacity: 1;
      }
      .tag-popover-all-title {
        font-size: 0.7rem;
        font-weight: 700;
        color: var(--text-secondary);
        text-transform: uppercase;
        letter-spacing: 0.3px;
        margin: 8px 0 4px;
        padding-top: 8px;
        border-top: 1px solid var(--border-color);
      }
      .tag-popover-all-list {
        display: flex;
        flex-wrap: wrap;
        gap: 4px;
      }
      .tag-popover-global {
        display: inline-flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: 3px;
        font-size: 0.7rem;
        padding: 3px 8px;
        border-radius: 999px;
        border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
        background: var(--bg-input);
        color: var(--text-primary);
        cursor: pointer;
        transition: all 0.12s;
      }
      .tag-popover-global:hover {
        border-color: var(--color-primary);
        background: rgba(122, 1, 1, 0.05);
      }
      .tag-popover-global .tag-count {
        font-size: 0.6rem;
        color: var(--text-secondary);
        font-weight: 700;
      }
      .tag-popover-global-chip {
        display: inline-flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: 4px;
        padding: 3px 8px;
        border-radius: 999px;
        border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
        background: var(--bg-input);
        font-size: 0.7rem;
        transition: all 0.12s;
      }
      .tag-popover-global-chip:hover {
        border-color: var(--color-primary);
        background: rgba(122, 1, 1, 0.03);
      }
      .tag-popover-global-chip .tag-click-target {
        cursor: pointer;
        display: inline-flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: 3px;
        font-weight: 600;
      }
      .tag-popover-global-chip .tag-action-btn {
        background: none;
        border: none;
        cursor: pointer;
        opacity: 0;
        width: 14px;
        height: 14px;
        padding: 0;
        display: inline-flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        color: var(--text-secondary);
        transition:
          opacity 0.15s,
          color 0.15s;
      }
      .tag-popover-global-chip:hover .tag-action-btn {
        opacity: 0.6;
      }
      .tag-popover-global-chip .tag-action-btn:hover {
        opacity: 1;
      }
      .tag-popover-global-chip .tag-edit-btn:hover {
        color: var(--color-primary);
      }
      .tag-popover-global-chip .tag-delete-btn:hover {
        color: #ef4444;
      }

      @keyframes ac-spin {
        to {
          transform: rotate(360deg);
        }
      }

      /* Tag toast */
      .tag-toast {
        position: fixed;
        bottom: 80px;
        left: 50%;
        transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(20px);
        background: var(--bg-chat);
        border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
        border-radius: 10px;
        box-shadow: var(--shadow-lg);
        padding: 10px 16px;
        z-index: 4000;
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: 8px;
        font-size: 0.84rem;
        font-weight: 600;
        color: var(--text-primary);
        opacity: 0;
        transition: all 0.3s ease;
        pointer-events: none;
      }
      .tag-toast.visible {
        opacity: 1;
        transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(0);
        pointer-events: auto;
      }
      .tag-toast button {
        padding: 4px 10px;
        border-radius: 6px;
        border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
        background: var(--bg-input);
        font-size: 0.78rem;
        font-weight: 700;
        cursor: pointer;
        color: var(--text-primary);
        transition: all 0.12s;
      }
      .tag-toast button.primary {
        background: var(--color-primary);
        color: #fff;
        border-color: var(--color-primary);
      }
      .tag-toast button:hover {
        opacity: 0.85;
      }
      /* ============================================
           QUICK INPUT MODAL (PRD-1)
           ============================================ */
      .qi-modal-backdrop {
        position: fixed;
        inset: 0;
        background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4);
        z-index: 5000;
        display: none;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        animation: fadeIn 0.2s;
      }
      .qi-modal-backdrop.active {
        display: flex;
      }
      .qi-modal {
        background: var(--bg-chat);
        border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
        border-radius: 14px;
        box-shadow: var(--shadow-lg);
        width: 480px;
        max-width: 92vw;
        max-height: 85vh;
        overflow-y: auto;
        animation: slideUp 0.2s ease;
      }
      @keyframes slideUp {
        from {
          transform: translateY(20px);
          opacity: 0;
        }
        to {
          transform: translateY(0);
          opacity: 1;
        }
      }
      .qi-header {
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: space-between;
        padding: 16px 20px;
        border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-color);
      }
      .qi-header h3 {
        font-size: 1rem;
        font-weight: 800;
        color: var(--color-wine);
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: 8px;
        margin: 0;
      }
      [data-theme="dark"] .qi-header h3 {
        color: var(--color-primary);
      }
      .qi-close {
        background: transparent;
        border: none;
        font-size: 18px;
        color: var(--text-secondary);
        cursor: pointer;
        padding: 4px 8px;
        border-radius: 6px;
        line-height: 1;
      }
      .qi-close:hover {
        background: var(--color-light-gray);
      }
      .qi-body {
        padding: 16px 20px;
        display: flex;
        flex-direction: column;
        gap: 14px;
      }
      .qi-field {
        display: flex;
        flex-direction: column;
        gap: 5px;
      }
      .qi-field label {
        font-size: 0.78rem;
        font-weight: 700;
        color: var(--text-secondary);
        text-transform: uppercase;
        letter-spacing: 0.3px;
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: 5px;
      }
      .qi-field label .qi-req {
        color: var(--color-primary);
      }
      /* Autocomplete (searchable dropdown) */
      .qi-ac {
        position: relative;
      }
      .qi-ac-selected {
        display: flex;
        flex-wrap: wrap;
        gap: 4px;
        padding: 6px 8px;
        border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
        border-radius: 8px;
        background: var(--bg-input);
        min-height: 38px;
        align-items: center;
        cursor: text;
        transition: border-color 0.15s;
      }
      .qi-ac-selected:focus-within {
        border-color: var(--color-primary);
      }
      .qi-ac-pill {
        display: inline-flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: 4px;
        padding: 3px 8px;
        border-radius: 999px;
        font-size: 0.76rem;
        font-weight: 700;
        background: rgba(122, 1, 1, 0.1);
        color: var(--color-primary);
        white-space: nowrap;
      }
      .qi-ac-pill button {
        background: none;
        border: none;
        color: inherit;
        cursor: pointer;
        font-size: 11px;
        padding: 0;
        line-height: 1;
        opacity: 0.6;
      }
      .qi-ac-pill button:hover {
        opacity: 1;
      }
      .qi-ac-input {
        flex: 1;
        min-width: 60px;
        border: none;
        background: transparent;
        font-size: 0.85rem;
        color: var(--text-primary);
        outline: none;
        font-weight: 500;
        padding: 2px 4px;
      }
      .qi-ac-input::placeholder {
        color: var(--text-secondary);
        opacity: 0.5;
      }
      .qi-ac-input:empty::before {
        content: attr(data-placeholder);
        color: var(--text-secondary);
        opacity: 0.5;
        pointer-events: none;
      }
      .qi-ac-clear {
        background: none;
        border: none;
        color: var(--text-secondary);
        cursor: pointer;
        font-size: 14px;
        padding: 0 2px;
        line-height: 1;
        flex-shrink: 0;
        display: none;
      }
      .qi-ac-clear.visible {
        display: block;
      }
      .qi-ac-dropdown {
        position: absolute;
        top: 100%;
        left: 0;
        right: 0;
        margin-top: 4px;
        background: var(--bg-chat);
        border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
        border-radius: 8px;
        box-shadow: var(--shadow-md);
        max-height: 180px;
        overflow-y: auto;
        z-index: 10;
        display: none;
      }
      .qi-ac-dropdown.open {
        display: block;
      }
      .qi-ac-option {
        padding: 8px 12px;
        font-size: 0.84rem;
        cursor: pointer;
        color: var(--text-primary);
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: 8px;
        transition: background 0.1s;
      }
      .qi-ac-option:hover,
      .qi-ac-option.highlighted {
        background: rgba(122, 1, 1, 0.06);
      }
      .qi-ac-option.selected {
        font-weight: 700;
        color: var(--color-primary);
      }
      .qi-ac-option.selected::before {
        content: "✓";
        font-size: 0.75rem;
        font-weight: 800;
        flex-shrink: 0;
      }
      .qi-ac-option .opt-sub {
        font-size: 0.7rem;
        color: var(--text-secondary);
        margin-left: auto;
        white-space: nowrap;
      }
      .qi-ac-empty {
        padding: 10px 12px;
        font-size: 0.8rem;
        color: var(--text-secondary);
        text-align: center;
      }
      .qi-ac-all-btn {
        padding: 7px 12px;
        font-size: 0.82rem;
        font-weight: 700;
        cursor: pointer;
        border: none;
        background: transparent;
        color: var(--color-primary);
        width: 100%;
        text-align: left;
        border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-color);
      }
      .qi-ac-all-btn:hover {
        background: rgba(122, 1, 1, 0.04);
      }
      /* Text input for campanha/produto */
      .qi-field input[type="text"] {
        padding: 8px 12px;
        border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
        border-radius: 8px;
        font-size: 0.88rem;
        background: var(--bg-input);
        color: var(--text-primary);
        outline: none;
        font-weight: 500;
        transition: border-color 0.15s;
      }
      .qi-field input[type="text"]:focus {
        border-color: var(--color-primary);
      }
      .qi-field textarea {
        padding: 8px 12px;
        border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
        border-radius: 8px;
        font-size: 0.88rem;
        background: var(--bg-input);
        color: var(--text-primary);
        outline: none;
        font-family: inherit;
        resize: vertical;
        min-height: 48px;
        max-height: 80px;
        transition: border-color 0.15s;
      }
      .qi-field textarea:focus {
        border-color: var(--color-primary);
      }
      /* Chips (focus options) */
      .qi-chips {
        display: flex;
        flex-wrap: wrap;
        gap: 6px;
      }
      .qi-chip {
        padding: 6px 12px;
        border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
        border-radius: 999px;
        font-size: 0.8rem;
        font-weight: 600;
        cursor: pointer;
        background: var(--bg-input);
        color: var(--text-secondary);
        transition: all 0.15s;
        user-select: none;
        display: inline-flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: 5px;
      }
      .qi-chip:hover {
        border-color: var(--color-primary);
        color: var(--text-primary);
      }
      .qi-chip.selected {
        background: var(--color-primary);
        color: #fff;
        border-color: var(--color-primary);
      }
      .qi-footer {
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: flex-end;
        gap: 8px;
        padding: 12px 20px;
        border-top: 1px solid var(--border-color);
      }
      .qi-btn {
        padding: 8px 18px;
        border-radius: 8px;
        font-size: 0.85rem;
        font-weight: 700;
        cursor: pointer;
        transition: all 0.15s;
      }
      .qi-btn-cancel {
        background: transparent;
        border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
        color: var(--text-secondary);
      }
      .qi-btn-cancel:hover {
        background: var(--color-light-gray);
      }
      .qi-btn-confirm {
        background: var(--color-primary);
        border: none;
        color: #fff;
      }
      .qi-btn-confirm:hover {
        background: var(--color-primary-hover);
      }
      .qi-btn-confirm:disabled {
        opacity: 0.5;
        cursor: not-allowed;
      }
      /* Analyze button */
      .btn-analyze {
        background: transparent;
        border: 2px solid var(--color-primary);
        color: var(--color-primary);
        width: 44px;
        height: 44px;
        border-radius: 50%;
        cursor: pointer;
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        transition: all 0.2s;
        flex-shrink: 0;
      }
      .btn-analyze:hover {
        background: var(--color-primary);
        color: #fff;
      }
      /* ============================================
           IMPROVED INPUT AREA */
      #messageInput {
        flex: 1;
        padding: 14px 20px;
        border: 2px solid var(--border-color);
        background: var(--bg-input);
        color: var(--text-primary);
        border-radius: 24px;
        font-size: 15px;
        outline: none;
        transition: all 0.2s;
        resize: none;
        max-height: 120px;
        min-height: 48px;
        font-family: inherit;
        line-height: 1.5;
        overflow-y: hidden;
      }

      #messageInput:focus {
        border-color: var(--color-primary);
        box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(216, 36, 68, 0.1);
      }

      /* BETTER NEW CHAT BUTTON */
      #newChatBtn {
        width: 100%;
        padding: 14px 16px;
        background: var(--color-primary);
        color: white;
        border: none;
        border-radius: 8px;
        font-size: 14px;
        font-weight: 600;
        cursor: pointer;
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        gap: 10px;
        transition: all 0.3s;
        box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(216, 36, 68, 0.3);
      }

      #newChatBtn:hover {
        background: var(--color-primary-hover);
        transform: translateY(-2px);
        box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(216, 36, 68, 0.4);
      }

      #newChatBtn svg {
        width: 18px;
        height: 18px;
      }

      /* BETTER DELETE BUTTON */
      .delete-btn {
        background: transparent;
        border: none;
        color: var(--text-secondary);
        cursor: pointer;
        padding: 4px;
        transition: all 0.2s;
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        border-radius: 4px;
      }

      .delete-btn:hover {
        background: rgba(216, 36, 68, 0.1);
        color: var(--color-primary);
      }

      .delete-btn svg {
        width: 16px;
        height: 16px;
      }

      /* UPLOADED FILE INDICATOR */
      .file-attachment {
        display: inline-flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: 8px;
        background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2);
        padding: 6px 12px;
        border-radius: 6px;
        margin-top: 8px;
        font-size: 13px;
      }

      .file-attachment svg {
        width: 14px;
        height: 14px;
      }

      /* ============================================
           MOBILE RESPONSIVE
           ============================================ */
      @media (max-width: 768px) {
        .chat-header {
          padding: 12px 16px;
        }

        .logo-area {
          gap: 10px;
        }

        .senai-logo {
          font-size: 1.1rem;
        }

        .dt-tag {
          display: none;
        }

        .header-title {
          font-size: 0.8rem;
          display: none;
        }

        .connection-status {
          font-size: 0.65rem;
          padding: 4px 8px;
        }

        .main-grid {
          grid-template-columns: 1fr;
          position: relative;
        }

        /* On mobile, ALWAYS use 1fr - don't collapse grid */
        .main-grid.sidebar-closed {
          grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        }

        #sidebar {
          position: absolute;
          left: 0;
          top: 0;
          width: 260px;
          height: 100%;
          z-index: 200;
          box-shadow: 2px 0 10px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3);
          transition: transform 0.3s ease;
          transform: translateX(-100%);
        }

        /* Show sidebar when NOT closed (toggle button clicked) */
        .main-grid:not(.sidebar-closed) #sidebar {
          transform: translateX(0);
        }

        .sidebar-backdrop {
          display: none;
          position: absolute;
          top: 0;
          left: 0;
          right: 0;
          bottom: 0;
          background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
          z-index: 199;
          pointer-events: none;
        }

        /* Show backdrop when sidebar is open */
        .main-grid:not(.sidebar-closed) .sidebar-backdrop {
          display: block;
          pointer-events: auto;
        }

        .message {
          max-width: 85%;
        }

        #messagesContainer {
          padding: 15px;
          gap: 20px;
          /* Force spacing on mobile too */
        }

        .action-btn {
          width: 44px;
          height: 44px;
        }

        .toggle-sidebar-btn {
          width: 44px;
          height: 44px;
        }
      }

      @media (max-width: 480px) {
        .chat-header {
          padding: 10px 12px;
        }

        .senai-logo {
          font-size: 1rem;
        }

        .connection-status span {
          display: none;
        }

        .message {
          max-width: 90%;
        }

        .message-content {
          padding: 12px 14px;
          font-size: 14px;
        }

        #inputArea {
          padding: 12px;
        }

        #messageInput {
          font-size: 14px;
          padding: 12px 16px;
        }
      }

      /* ============================================
           NEW COMPONENTS: MODALS & SIDEBAR FOOTER
           ============================================ */

      /* LOGIN OVERLAY */
      .login-overlay {
        position: fixed;
        top: 0;
        left: 0;
        width: 100%;
        height: 100%;
        background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.85);
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        z-index: 9999;
        backdrop-filter: blur(5px);
      }

      .login-box {
        background: var(--bg-chat);
        padding: 40px;
        border-radius: 12px;
        width: 100%;
        max-width: 400px;
        box-shadow: 0 10px 25px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
        text-align: center;
        border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
      }

      .login-title {
        color: var(--color-primary);
        font-size: 24px;
        font-weight: 800;
        margin-bottom: 20px;
        letter-spacing: -0.5px;
      }

      .login-input {
        width: 100%;
        padding: 12px 16px;
        margin-bottom: 15px;
        border: 2px solid var(--border-color);
        background: var(--bg-input);
        color: var(--text-primary);
        border-radius: 8px;
        font-size: 16px;
        outline: none;
      }

      .login-input:focus {
        border-color: var(--color-primary);
      }

      .login-btn {
        width: 100%;
        padding: 12px;
        background: var(--color-primary);
        color: white;
        border: none;
        border-radius: 8px;
        font-size: 16px;
        font-weight: 600;
        cursor: pointer;
        transition: all 0.2s;
      }

      .login-btn:hover {
        background: var(--color-primary-hover);
      }

      /* CONFIRM MODAL */
      .confirm-modal-backdrop {
        position: fixed;
        top: 0;
        left: 0;
        width: 100%;
        height: 100%;
        background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.7);
        display: none;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        z-index: 10000;
      }

      .confirm-modal-backdrop.active {
        display: flex;
      }

      .confirm-modal {
        background: var(--bg-chat);
        padding: 24px;
        border-radius: 12px;
        width: 90%;
        max-width: 320px;
        box-shadow: 0 10px 25px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
        border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
        animation: fadeIn 0.2s ease-out;
      }

      .confirm-title {
        font-size: 18px;
        font-weight: 600;
        color: var(--text-primary);
        margin-bottom: 12px;
      }

      .confirm-text {
        color: var(--text-secondary);
        font-size: 14px;
        margin-bottom: 20px;
      }

      .confirm-actions {
        display: flex;
        gap: 10px;
        justify-content: flex-end;
      }

      .btn-modal {
        padding: 8px 16px;
        border-radius: 6px;
        font-size: 14px;
        font-weight: 600;
        cursor: pointer;
        border: none;
      }

      .btn-cancel {
        background: transparent;
        color: var(--text-secondary);
        border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
      }

      .btn-confirm {
        background: var(--color-primary);
        color: white;
      }

      /* SIDEBAR FOOTER & USER PROFILE */
      .sidebar-footer {
        padding: 16px;
        border-top: 1px solid var(--border-color);
        background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.03);
        margin-top: auto;
      }

      [data-theme="dark"] .sidebar-footer {
        background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2);
      }

      .user-profile {
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: 12px;
        padding: 8px;
        background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05);
        border-radius: 8px;
      }

      [data-theme="dark"] .user-profile {
        background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05);
      }

      .user-avatar {
        width: 36px;
        height: 36px;
        border-radius: 50%;
        background: var(--color-primary);
        color: white;
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        font-weight: 700;
        font-size: 14px;
      }

      .user-info {
        flex: 1;
        overflow: hidden;
      }

      .user-name {
        font-size: 13px;
        font-weight: 600;
        color: var(--text-primary);
        white-space: nowrap;
        overflow: hidden;
        text-overflow: ellipsis;
      }

      .user-role {
        font-size: 11px;
        color: var(--text-secondary);
      }

      .footer-actions {
        display: flex;
        gap: 8px;
        margin-top: 12px;
        flex-wrap: wrap;
      }

      .footer-btn {
        flex: 1;
        padding: 8px;
        border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
        background: transparent;
        color: var(--text-primary);
        border-radius: 6px;
        cursor: pointer;
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        gap: 6px;
        font-size: 12px;
        transition: all 0.2s;
      }

      .footer-btn:hover {
        background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05);
        color: var(--color-primary);
      }

      [data-theme="dark"] .footer-btn:hover {
        background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
        color: white;
      }

      .err-msg {
        color: #ff4444;
        font-size: 13px;
        margin-top: 10px;
        display: none;
      }

      /* EMPTY STATE */
      .empty-state {
        display: none;
        /* Hidden by default */
        flex-direction: column;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        height: 100%;
        text-align: center;
        padding: 20px;
        color: var(--text-secondary);
        animation: fadeIn 0.3s ease-out;
      }

      .empty-state.show {
        display: flex;
      }

      .empty-icon {
        width: 64px;
        height: 64px;
        color: var(--color-primary);
        margin-bottom: 20px;
        opacity: 0.8;
        background: rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.1);
        padding: 16px;
        border-radius: 50%;
      }

      .empty-title {
        font-size: 24px;
        font-weight: 700;
        color: var(--text-primary);
        margin-bottom: 10px;
      }

      .empty-subtitle {
        font-size: 16px;
        max-width: 400px;
        line-height: 1.5;
      }

      /* Custom styles for Evolução Tab and Alterações */
      .dash-metric-chip {
        padding: 6px 12px;
        background: var(--bg-body);
        color: var(--text-secondary);
        border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
        border-radius: 20px;
        font-size: 13px;
        font-weight: 600;
        cursor: pointer;
        transition: all 0.2s;
      }
      .batch-action-btn {
        display: inline-flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        width: 30px;
        height: 30px;
        margin-left: 4px;
        padding: 0;
        background: var(--bg-body);
        color: var(--text-secondary);
        border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
        border-radius: 8px;
        cursor: pointer;
        transition: all 0.2s;
      }
      .batch-action-btn:hover {
        background: var(--border-color);
        color: var(--text-primary);
      }
      .batch-action-btn.danger:hover {
        background: #b91c1c;
        border-color: #b91c1c;
        color: #fff;
      }
      .batch-action-btn i {
        width: 15px;
        height: 15px;
      }
      .dash-metric-chip:hover {
        background: var(--border-color);
        color: var(--text-primary);
      }
      .dash-metric-chip.active {
        background: var(--color-primary);
        color: white;
        border-color: var(--color-primary);
      }
      .dash-table {
        margin-top: 15px;
      }
      .dash-table th,
      .dash-table td {
        padding: 10px;
        border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-color);
        font-size: 13px;
      }
      .dash-table th {
        font-weight: 700;
        color: var(--text-secondary);
      }
      .good {
        color: #059669 !important;
      }
      .bad {
        color: #dc2626 !important;
      }
      .change-item {
        transition: background-color 0.2s;
      }
      .change-item:hover {
        background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.02);
      }
      [data-theme="dark"] .change-item:hover {
        background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.02);
      }
      .alterado-badge {
        background: #fef3c7;
        color: #d97706;
        border: 1px solid #fde68a;
        padding: 2px 6px;
        font-size: 10px;
        font-weight: 700;
        border-radius: 4px;
        text-transform: uppercase;
        cursor: pointer;
        display: inline-flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: 2px;
        transition: all 0.2s;
      }
      .alterado-badge:hover {
        background: #fde68a;
      }
      [data-theme="dark"] .alterado-badge {
        background: rgba(217, 119, 6, 0.2);
        color: #fbbf24;
        border-color: rgba(217, 119, 6, 0.3);
      }
      [data-theme="dark"] .alterado-badge:hover {
        background: rgba(217, 119, 6, 0.3);
      }
      .dash-analyze-btn {
        background: transparent;
        border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
        color: var(--text-secondary);
        width: 28px;
        height: 28px;
        border-radius: 4px;
        cursor: pointer;
        display: inline-flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        transition: all 0.2s;
      }
      .dash-analyze-btn:hover {
        border-color: var(--color-primary);
        color: var(--color-primary);
        background: rgba(122, 1, 1, 0.05);
      }

      @keyframes fadeIn {
        from {
          opacity: 0;
          transform: translateY(10px);
        }

        to {
          opacity: 1;
          transform: translateY(0);
        }
      }
    </style>
  </head>

  <body>
    <div class="app-container">
      <!-- HEADER 100% -->
      <header class="chat-header">
        <button
          class="toggle-sidebar-btn"
          id="toggleSidebarBtn"
          title="Alternar lista de conversas"
        >
          <i data-lucide="panel-left"></i>
        </button>
        <div class="logo-area">
          <img
            src="https://www.embaplan.com.br/img/logo.png"
            alt="Embaplan"
            class="embaplan-logo"
          />
          <div
            class="header-title"
            style="
              margin-left: 10px;
              border-left: 1px solid var(--border-color);
              padding-left: 15px;
            "
          >
            Assistente de Inteligência Artificial
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="header-right">
          <div class="connection-status">
            <div class="connection-dot"></div>
            <span>Online</span>
          </div>
          <button
            id="dashboardBtn"
            class="reset-badge-btn"
            title="Dashboard de Performance"
          >
            <i data-lucide="layout-dashboard"></i>
            <span>Dashboard</span>
          </button>
          <button
            id="resetRagBtn"
            class="reset-badge-btn"
            title="Resetar Memória RAG"
          >
            <i data-lucide="database-backup"></i>
            <span>Resetar</span>
          </button>
        </div>
      </header>
      <!-- GRID: Sidebar + Chat -->
      <div class="main-grid">
        <div class="sidebar-backdrop" id="sidebarBackdrop"></div>
        <!-- SIDEBAR -->
        <aside id="sidebar">
          <div id="sidebar-header">
            <button id="newChatBtn" title="Iniciar nova conversa">
              <i data-lucide="plus"></i>
              <span>Nova conversa</span>
            </button>
          </div>
          <!-- Tag Filter Bar -->
          <div class="tag-filter-bar" id="tagFilterBar">
            <span class="tf-icon"><i data-lucide="tag"></i></span>
            <input
              type="text"
              id="tagFilterInput"
              placeholder="Filtrar por tag ou nome..."
            />
            <button
              class="tag-filter-clear"
              id="tagFilterClear"
              title="Limpar filtro"
            >
              ✕
            </button>
          </div>
          <div id="sessionList">
            <!-- Sessões carregadas aqui -->
          </div>
          <div
            id="dashboardSidebarNote"
            style="
              display: none;
              flex-direction: column;
              gap: 14px;
              padding: 20px;
              overflow-y: auto;
            "
          >
            <div
              style="
                font-size: 14px;
                font-weight: 700;
                display: flex;
                align-items: center;
                gap: 6px;
                color: var(--text-primary);
              "
            >
              <i
                data-lucide="bar-chart-3"
                style="width: 16px; height: 16px"
              ></i>
              <span>Resumo do Painel</span>
            </div>
            <div
              id="dashboardSidebarStats"
              style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 10px"
            >
              <div style="font-size: 12px; color: var(--text-secondary)">
                Carregando…
              </div>
            </div>
            <p
              style="
                font-size: 11px;
                line-height: 1.5;
                margin: 0;
                color: var(--text-secondary);
                border-top: 1px solid var(--border-color);
                padding-top: 12px;
              "
            >
              As conversas ficam ocultas no modo painel. Feche o painel para
              voltar ao histórico de chats.
            </p>
          </div>
          <!-- SIDEBAR FOOTER -->
          <div class="sidebar-footer">
            <div class="user-profile">
              <div class="user-avatar">AD</div>
              <div class="user-info">
                <div class="user-name">Administrador</div>
                <div class="user-role">Sistema</div>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div class="footer-actions">
              <button
                class="footer-btn"
                id="uploadSheetBtn"
                title="Enviar a planilha do mês para alimentar a linha do tempo"
                style="flex: 1 1 100%"
              >
                <i
                  data-lucide="calendar-plus"
                  style="width: 14px; height: 14px"
                ></i>
                <span>Planilha do Mês</span>
              </button>
              <input
                type="file"
                id="sheetFileInput"
                accept=".xlsx,.xls,.csv,application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet,application/vnd.ms-excel,text/csv"
                style="display: none"
              />
              <button
                class="footer-btn"
                id="themeToggleBtn"
                title="Alternar Tema"
              >
                <i data-lucide="moon" style="width: 14px; height: 14px"></i>
                <span>Tema</span>
              </button>
              <button class="footer-btn" id="logoutBtn" title="Sair do sistema">
                <i data-lucide="log-out" style="width: 14px; height: 14px"></i>
                <span>Sair</span>
              </button>
            </div>
          </div>
        </aside>
        <!-- CHAT AREA -->
        <main id="chatArea">
          <div id="messagesContainer"></div>

          <!-- Empty State -->
          <div id="emptyState" class="empty-state">
            <div class="empty-icon">
              <i
                data-lucide="message-square-dashed"
                style="width: 100%; height: 100%"
              ></i>
            </div>
            <div class="empty-title">Como posso ajudar?</div>
            <div class="empty-subtitle">
              Estou pronto para responder dúvidas sobre a Embaplan, vendas ou
              analisar os seus relatórios e planilhas.
            </div>
          </div>

          <div class="loading" id="loading">
            <div class="loading-dots">
              <span></span><span></span><span></span>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div id="inputArea">
            <div class="status-info" id="statusMessage"></div>
            <form id="inputForm">
              <input type="file" id="fileInput" style="display: none" />
              <textarea
                id="messageInput"
                placeholder="Digite sua mensagem..."
                rows="1"
              ></textarea>
              <div class="controls">
                <button
                  type="button"
                  class="action-btn btn-attach"
                  id="attachBtn"
                  title="Anexar arquivo"
                >
                  <i data-lucide="paperclip"></i>
                </button>
                <button
                  type="button"
                  class="btn-analyze"
                  id="analyzeBtn"
                  title="Analisar com contexto rápido"
                >
                  <i data-lucide="search"></i>
                </button>

                <button
                  type="submit"
                  class="action-btn btn-send"
                  id="sendBtn"
                  title="Enviar"
                >
                  <i data-lucide="send"></i>
                </button>
              </div>
            </form>
          </div>
        </main>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- MODALS -->
    <!-- Login Overlay -->
    <div class="login-overlay" id="loginOverlay">
      <div class="login-box">
        <div class="login-title">Acesso Restrito</div>
        <form id="loginForm">
          <input
            type="text"
            class="login-input"
            id="usernameInput"
            placeholder="Usuário"
            required
          />
          <input
            type="password"
            class="login-input"
            id="passwordInput"
            placeholder="Senha"
            required
          />
          <button type="submit" class="login-btn">Entrar</button>
          <div class="err-msg" id="loginError">Credenciais inválidas</div>
        </form>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Confirm Modal -->
    <div class="confirm-modal-backdrop" id="confirmModal">
      <div class="confirm-modal">
        <h3 class="confirm-title">Excluir conversa</h3>
        <p class="confirm-text">
          Tem certeza que deseja excluir esta conversa permanentemente? Esta
          ação não pode ser desfeita.
        </p>
        <div class="confirm-actions">
          <button class="btn-modal btn-cancel" id="cancelDeleteBtn">
            Cancelar
          </button>
          <button class="btn-modal btn-confirm" id="confirmDeleteBtn">
            Excluir
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Tag Delete Confirm Modal -->
    <div class="confirm-modal-backdrop" id="tagDeleteModal">
      <div class="confirm-modal">
        <h3 class="confirm-title">Excluir Tag</h3>
        <p class="confirm-text">
          Tem certeza que deseja excluir a tag
          <strong id="tagDeleteTarget"></strong> permanentemente? Ela será
          removida de todas as conversas atreladas.
        </p>
        <div class="confirm-actions">
          <button class="btn-modal btn-cancel" id="tagDeleteCancelBtn">
            Cancelar
          </button>
          <button
            class="btn-modal btn-confirm"
            id="tagDeleteConfirmBtn"
            style="background-color: #ef4444"
          >
            Excluir
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Tag Edit/Rename Modal -->
    <div class="confirm-modal-backdrop" id="tagRenameModal">
      <div class="confirm-modal">
        <h3 class="confirm-title">Editar Tag</h3>
        <p class="confirm-text" style="margin-bottom: 12px">
          Altere o nome da tag. Ela será alterada em todas as conversas onde
          estiver atrelada.
        </p>
        <input
          type="text"
          id="tagRenameInput"
          class="login-input"
          style="margin-bottom: 15px"
          placeholder="Nome da tag"
        />
        <div class="confirm-actions">
          <button class="btn-modal btn-cancel" id="tagRenameCancelBtn">
            Cancelar
          </button>
          <button class="btn-modal btn-confirm" id="tagRenameConfirmBtn">
            Salvar
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Edit Batch (planilha) Modal -->
    <div class="confirm-modal-backdrop" id="batchEditModal">
      <div class="confirm-modal">
        <h3 class="confirm-title">Editar planilha</h3>
        <p class="confirm-text" style="margin-bottom: 12px">
          Altere a data (mês de referência) e o nome desta planilha. A data
          define a posição dela na linha do tempo.
        </p>
        <label
          style="
            font-size: 12px;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: var(--text-secondary);
            display: block;
            margin-bottom: 4px;
          "
          >Data da planilha</label
        >
        <input
          type="date"
          id="batchEditDate"
          class="login-input"
          style="margin-bottom: 12px"
        />
        <label
          style="
            font-size: 12px;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: var(--text-secondary);
            display: block;
            margin-bottom: 4px;
          "
          >Nome (rótulo)</label
        >
        <input
          type="text"
          id="batchEditLabel"
          class="login-input"
          style="margin-bottom: 15px"
          placeholder="Ex.: Abril 2026"
        />
        <div class="confirm-actions">
          <button class="btn-modal btn-cancel" id="batchEditCancelBtn">
            Cancelar
          </button>
          <button class="btn-modal btn-confirm" id="batchEditConfirmBtn">
            Salvar
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Ad History / Timeline Modal -->
    <div class="confirm-modal-backdrop" id="historyModal">
      <div class="confirm-modal history-modal">
        <div class="history-modal-head">
          <h3 class="confirm-title" id="historyTitle">
            Linha do tempo do anúncio
          </h3>
          <div class="history-head-actions">
            <a
              id="historyLink"
              class="history-open-ad"
              href="#"
              target="_blank"
              rel="noopener noreferrer"
              style="display: none"
            >
              <i data-lucide="external-link"></i> Abrir anúncio
            </a>
            <button class="history-close" id="historyCloseBtn" title="Fechar">
              ✕
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div id="historySummary" class="history-summary"></div>
        <div class="history-view-tabs">
          <button class="hv-tab active" data-view="timeline">
            <i data-lucide="line-chart"></i> Linha do tempo
          </button>
          <button class="hv-tab" data-view="recs">
            <i data-lucide="check-circle"></i> Recomendações
          </button>
        </div>
        <div id="historyViewTimeline">
          <div class="history-metric-tabs" id="historyMetricTabs">
            <button class="hm-tab active" data-metric="saude">Saúde</button>
            <button class="hm-tab" data-metric="acos">ACOS</button>
            <button class="hm-tab" data-metric="roas">ROAS</button>
            <button class="hm-tab" data-metric="lucro">Lucro</button>
            <button class="hm-tab" data-metric="conversao">Conversão</button>
          </div>
          <div class="history-body" id="historyBody">
            <div class="history-empty">Carregando histórico…</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div id="historyViewRecs" style="display: none">
          <div class="recs-head">
            <span class="recs-head-title">Recomendações de otimização</span>
            <button
              class="recs-gen-btn"
              id="recsGenBtn"
              title="Gerar recomendações com IA a partir das métricas deste anúncio"
            >
              <i data-lucide="sparkles"></i><span>Gerar com IA</span>
            </button>
          </div>
          <div class="recs-body" id="recsBody">
            <div class="history-empty">Carregando recomendações…</div>
          </div>
          <div class="recs-add">
            <input
              type="text"
              id="recsOtherInput"
              class="recs-other-input"
              placeholder="Outros: descreva uma alteração que você fez por conta própria…"
            />
            <button class="recs-other-btn" id="recsOtherBtn">Registrar</button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Dashboard Overlay -->
    <div class="dashboard-overlay" id="dashboardOverlay">
      <div class="dashboard-head">
        <h2 class="dashboard-title">
          <i data-lucide="bar-chart-3"></i> Painel Embaplan
        </h2>
        <div class="dashboard-head-actions">
          <select id="dashboardLojaFilter" class="dashboard-filter">
            <option value="">Todas as lojas</option>
          </select>
          <button
            id="dashboardRefreshBtn"
            class="dashboard-icon-btn"
            title="Atualizar"
          >
            <i data-lucide="refresh-cw"></i>
          </button>
          <button
            id="dashboardChatBtn"
            class="dashboard-chat-btn"
            title="Ir para o chat"
          >
            <i data-lucide="message-square"></i><span>Falar com o agente</span>
          </button>
          <button
            id="dashboardCloseBtn"
            class="dashboard-icon-btn"
            title="Fechar"
          >
            ✕
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="dashboard-tabs" id="dashboardTabs">
        <button class="dash-tab active" data-tab="home">
          <i data-lucide="home"></i> Visão Geral
        </button>
        <button class="dash-tab" data-tab="alertas">
          <i data-lucide="siren"></i> Alertas
        </button>
        <button class="dash-tab" data-tab="comparar">
          <i data-lucide="store"></i> Comparar
        </button>
        <button class="dash-tab" data-tab="oportunidades">
          <i data-lucide="target"></i> O que revisar hoje
        </button>
        <button class="dash-tab" data-tab="evolucao">
          <i data-lucide="trending-up"></i> Evolução
        </button>
      </div>
      <div class="dashboard-content" id="dashboardContent">
        <div class="history-empty">Carregando dados…</div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Tag Popover (floating) -->
    <div class="tag-popover-backdrop" id="tagPopoverBackdrop"></div>
    <div class="tag-popover" id="tagPopover">
      <div class="tag-popover-title">🏷️ Tags desta conversa</div>
      <div class="tag-popover-input-row">
        <input
          type="text"
          id="tagPopoverInput"
          placeholder="Adicionar tag..."
        />
        <button class="tag-popover-add-btn" id="tagPopoverAddBtn">+</button>
      </div>
      <div class="tag-popover-list" id="tagPopoverList">
        <!-- Tags atuais aparecem aqui -->
      </div>
      <div class="tag-popover-all-title">Todas as minhas tags</div>
      <div class="tag-popover-all-list" id="tagPopoverAllList">
        <!-- Tags globais do usuário -->
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Quick Input Modal (PRD-1) -->
    <div class="qi-modal-backdrop" id="qiModalBackdrop">
      <div class="qi-modal">
        <div class="qi-header">
          <h3>🔍 Analisar com contexto</h3>
          <button class="qi-close" id="qiCloseBtn">✕</button>
        </div>
        <div class="qi-body">
          <div class="qi-field">
            <label
              ><i data-lucide="store" style="width: 12px; height: 12px"></i>
              Loja <span class="qi-req">*</span></label
            >
            <div
              class="qi-ac"
              id="qiLojaAC"
              data-multi="false"
              data-field="loja"
            >
              <div class="qi-ac-selected">
                <span
                  class="qi-ac-input"
                  contenteditable="true"
                  data-placeholder="Todas as lojas"
                ></span>
              </div>
              <button class="qi-ac-clear" title="Limpar">✕</button>
              <div class="qi-ac-dropdown"></div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="qi-field">
            <label
              ><i data-lucide="search" style="width: 12px; height: 12px"></i>
              Campanha / Anúncio</label
            >
            <div
              class="qi-ac"
              id="qiCampanhaAC"
              data-multi="true"
              data-field="campanha"
            >
              <div class="qi-ac-selected">
                <span
                  class="qi-ac-input"
                  contenteditable="true"
                  data-placeholder="Buscar anúncio..."
                ></span>
              </div>
              <button class="qi-ac-clear" title="Limpar">✕</button>
              <div class="qi-ac-dropdown"></div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="qi-field">
            <label
              ><i data-lucide="package" style="width: 12px; height: 12px"></i>
              Produto / Base</label
            >
            <div
              class="qi-ac"
              id="qiProdutoAC"
              data-multi="true"
              data-field="produto"
            >
              <div class="qi-ac-selected">
                <span
                  class="qi-ac-input"
                  contenteditable="true"
                  data-placeholder="Buscar produto..."
                ></span>
              </div>
              <button class="qi-ac-clear" title="Limpar">✕</button>
              <div class="qi-ac-dropdown"></div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="qi-field">
            <label
              ><i data-lucide="target" style="width: 12px; height: 12px"></i>
              Foco da Análise <span class="qi-req">*</span></label
            >
            <div class="qi-chips" id="qiFocoChips">
              <button class="qi-chip selected" data-foco="performance">
                📊 Performance Geral
              </button>
              <button class="qi-chip" data-foco="lucro">
                💰 Lucro / Margem
              </button>
              <button class="qi-chip" data-foco="acos">📉 ACOS / CTR</button>
              <button class="qi-chip" data-foco="escala">
                🚀 Oportunidade de Escala
              </button>
              <button class="qi-chip" data-foco="problemas">
                🛑 Problemas / Ralo
              </button>
              <button class="qi-chip" data-foco="comparar">
                🏷️ Comparar Lojas
              </button>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="qi-field">
            <label
              ><i
                data-lucide="message-square"
                style="width: 12px; height: 12px"
              ></i>
              Observações</label
            >
            <textarea
              id="qiObsInput"
              placeholder="Ex: quero saber se posso aumentar verba sem perder margem..."
            ></textarea>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="qi-footer">
          <button class="qi-btn qi-btn-cancel" id="qiCancelBtn">
            Cancelar
          </button>
          <button class="qi-btn qi-btn-confirm" id="qiConfirmBtn">
            🔍 Analisar
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <script>
      lucide.createIcons();

      const OVERVIEW_URL = `${API_BASE}/embaplan-overview`;

      const TAG_ADD_URL = `${API_BASE}/embaplan-add-tag`;

      const TAG_LIST_URL = `${API_BASE}/embaplan-list-tags`;
      const TAG_SESSION_URL = `${API_BASE}/embaplan-session-tags`;
      const TAG_RENAME_URL = `${API_BASE}/embaplan-rename-tag`;
      const TAG_DELETE_URL = `${API_BASE}/embaplan-delete-tag`;
      const AUTOCOMPLETE_URL = `${API_BASE}/embaplan-autocomplete`;
      const EVOLUTION_URL = `${API_BASE}/embaplan-portfolio-evolution`;
      const DETECT_CHANGES_URL = `${API_BASE}/embaplan-detect-changes`;
      const BATCH_UPDATE_URL = `${API_BASE}/embaplan-batch-update`;
      const BATCH_DELETE_URL = `${API_BASE}/embaplan-batch-delete`;

      // ============================================
      // ÍCONES SVG MONOCROMÁTICOS (sem emojis)
      // Paths no estilo Lucide (24x24, traço = currentColor).
      // ============================================
      const ICONS = {

        idea: '<path d="M15 14c.2-1 .7-1.7 1.5-2.5 1-.9 1.5-2.2 1.5-3.5A6 6 0 0 0 6 8c0 1 .2 2.2 1.5 3.5.7.7 1.3 1.5 1.5 2.5"/><path d="M9 18h6"/><path d="M10 22h4"/>',

        celebrate:
          '<path d="M5.8 11.3 2 22l10.7-3.79"/><path d="M4 3h.01"/><path d="M22 8h.01"/><path d="M15 2h.01"/><path d="M22 20h.01"/><path d="m22 2-2.24.75a2.9 2.9 0 0 0-1.96 3.12c.1.86-.57 1.63-1.45 1.63h-.38c-.86 0-1.6.6-1.76 1.44L12 12"/>',
        swords:
          '<polyline points="14.5 17.5 3 6 3 3 6 3 17.5 14.5"/><line x1="13" x2="19" y1="19" y2="13"/><line x1="16" x2="20" y1="16" y2="20"/><line x1="19" x2="21" y1="21" y2="19"/><polyline points="14.5 6.5 18 3 21 3 21 6 17.5 9.5"/><line x1="5" x2="9" y1="14" y2="18"/><line x1="7" x2="4" y1="17" y2="20"/><line x1="3" x2="5" y1="19" y2="21"/>',
        ban: '<circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"/><path d="m4.9 4.9 14.2 14.2"/>',
      };
      function svgIcon(name, cls) {
        const inner = ICONS[name];
        if (!inner) return "";
        return (
          '<svg class="ic' +
          (cls ? " " + cls : "") +
          '" viewBox="0 0 24 24" aria-hidden="true">' +
          inner +
          "</svg>"
        );
      }
      // Mapeia emojis -> ícone SVG (aplicado na saída de render e do chat).
      const EMOJI_ICON = {
        "🚀": "rocket",
        "⏳": "hourglass",
        "⚠️": "warning",
        "⚠": "warning",
        "🛑": "stop",
        "🏆": "trophy",
        "🎯": "target",
        "💰": "money",
        "📊": "chart",
        "📈": "trendUp",
        "📉": "trendDown",
        "🏠": "home",
        "🚨": "alert",
        "🏪": "store",
        "💡": "idea",
        "🔧": "wrench",
        "🛠️": "wrench",
        "🛠": "wrench",
        "📋": "clipboard",
        "✅": "checkCircle",
        "✔️": "check",
        "❌": "xCircle",
        "➖": "flat",
        "📦": "package",
        "🔍": "search",
        "📥": "upload",
        "📤": "upload",
        "🥊": "boxing",
        "❓": "question",

        "🟠": "warning",
        "✨": "sparkle",
        "⚔️": "swords",
        "⚔": "swords",
        "⛔": "ban",
      };
      const EMOJI_RE = new RegExp(
        "(" +
          Object.keys(EMOJI_ICON)
            .sort((a, b) => b.length - a.length)
            .map((e) => e.replace(/[.*+?^${}()|[\]\\]/g, "\\$&"))
            .join("|") +
          ")\\uFE0F?",
        "g",
      );
      function emojiToSvg(str) {
        if (str == null) return str;
        return String(str).replace(
          EMOJI_RE,
          (m, e) =>
            svgIcon(EMOJI_ICON[e] || EMOJI_ICON[e.replace("\uFE0F", "")]) || m,
        );
      }

      // Estado

      // Create Cancel Edit Button dynamically
