          const chip = document.createElement("div");
          chip.className = "tag-popover-global-chip";
          const inSession = tags.includes(tagName);
          if (inSession) chip.style.borderColor = tagColor(tagName);

          chip.innerHTML = `
            <span class="tag-click-target" title="${inSession ? "Remover desta conversa" : "Adicionar a esta conversa"}">
              <span style="color:${tagColor(tagName)}">${escapeHtml(tagName)}</span>
              <span class="tag-count" style="font-size:0.6rem;color:var(--text-secondary);font-weight:700;">(${tagCount})</span>
            </span>
            <button class="tag-action-btn tag-edit-btn" title="Editar tag globalmente">
              <i data-lucide="pencil" style="width:10px;height:10px"></i>
            </button>
            <button class="tag-action-btn tag-delete-btn" title="Excluir tag globalmente">
              <i data-lucide="trash-2" style="width:10px;height:10px"></i>
            </button>
          `;

          chip
            .querySelector(".tag-click-target")
            .addEventListener("click", () => {
              if (inSession) {
                removeTag(sid, tagName).then(renderTagPopover);
              } else {
                addTag(sid, tagName).then(renderTagPopover);
              }
            });

          chip.querySelector(".tag-edit-btn").addEventListener("click", (e) => {
            e.stopPropagation();
            showTagRenameModal(tagName);
          });

          chip
            .querySelector(".tag-delete-btn")
            .addEventListener("click", (e) => {
              e.stopPropagation();
              showTagDeleteModal(tagName);
            });

          allList.appendChild(chip);
        });
        if (window.lucide) {
          lucide.createIcons();
        }
      }

      // Tag popover event wiring
      document
        .getElementById("tagPopoverBackdrop")
        .addEventListener("click", closeTagPopover);
      document
        .getElementById("tagPopoverAddBtn")
        .addEventListener("click", () => {
          const input = document.getElementById("tagPopoverInput");
          const val = input.value.trim();
          if (val && tagPopoverSessionId) {
            addTag(tagPopoverSessionId, val).then(() => {
              input.value = "";
              renderTagPopover();
            });
          }
        });
      document
        .getElementById("tagPopoverInput")
        .addEventListener("keydown", (e) => {
          if (e.key === "Enter") {
            e.preventDefault();
            document.getElementById("tagPopoverAddBtn").click();
          }
        });

      // Delete Tag Modal
      let tagToDeleteName = null;
      function showTagDeleteModal(tagName) {
        tagToDeleteName = tagName;
        document.getElementById("tagDeleteTarget").textContent = tagName;
        document.getElementById("tagDeleteModal").classList.add("active");
      }
      function hideTagDeleteModal() {
        document.getElementById("tagDeleteModal").classList.remove("active");
        tagToDeleteName = null;
      }

      // Rename Tag Modal
      let tagToRenameName = null;
      function showTagRenameModal(tagName) {
        tagToRenameName = tagName;
        const input = document.getElementById("tagRenameInput");
        input.value = tagName;
        document.getElementById("tagRenameModal").classList.add("active");
        setTimeout(() => input.select(), 50);
      }
      function hideTagRenameModal() {
        document.getElementById("tagRenameModal").classList.remove("active");
        tagToRenameName = null;
      }

      // Delete Tag Modal confirmation
      document
        .getElementById("tagDeleteCancelBtn")
        .addEventListener("click", hideTagDeleteModal);
      document
        .getElementById("tagDeleteConfirmBtn")
        .addEventListener("click", async () => {
          if (tagToDeleteName) {
            const btn = document.getElementById("tagDeleteConfirmBtn");
            const oldText = btn.textContent;
            btn.textContent = "Excluindo...";
            btn.disabled = true;
            try {
              await deleteTagGlobal(tagToDeleteName);
            } finally {
              btn.textContent = oldText;
              btn.disabled = false;
              hideTagDeleteModal();
            }
          }
        });

      // Rename Tag Modal confirmation
      document
        .getElementById("tagRenameCancelBtn")
        .addEventListener("click", hideTagRenameModal);
      document
        .getElementById("tagRenameConfirmBtn")
        .addEventListener("click", async () => {
          if (tagToRenameName) {
            const newName = document
              .getElementById("tagRenameInput")
              .value.trim();
            if (newName && newName !== tagToRenameName) {
              const btn = document.getElementById("tagRenameConfirmBtn");
              const oldText = btn.textContent;
              btn.textContent = "Salvando...";
              btn.disabled = true;
              try {
                await renameTagGlobal(tagToRenameName, newName);
              } finally {
                btn.textContent = oldText;
                btn.disabled = false;
                hideTagRenameModal();
              }
            } else {
              hideTagRenameModal();
            }
          }
        });
      document
        .getElementById("tagRenameInput")
        .addEventListener("keydown", (e) => {
          if (e.key === "Enter") {
            e.preventDefault();
            document.getElementById("tagRenameConfirmBtn").click();
          }
        });

      // Edit Batch (planilha) Modal
      document
        .getElementById("batchEditCancelBtn")
        .addEventListener("click", () => {
          document.getElementById("batchEditModal").classList.remove("active");
          batchEditTargetId = null;
        });
      document
        .getElementById("batchEditConfirmBtn")
        .addEventListener("click", saveBatchEdit);
      document
        .getElementById("batchEditModal")
        .addEventListener("click", (e) => {
          if (e.target.id === "batchEditModal") {
            document
              .getElementById("batchEditModal")
              .classList.remove("active");
            batchEditTargetId = null;
          }
        });
      document
        .getElementById("batchEditLabel")
        .addEventListener("keydown", (e) => {
          if (e.key === "Enter") {
            e.preventDefault();
            saveBatchEdit();
          }
        });

      // ============================================
      // QUICK INPUT MODAL (PRD-1) — com autocomplete
      // ============================================
      let qiSelectedFocos = new Set(["performance"]);

      // — Autocomplete engine —
      // — Autocomplete engine —
      function qiCampanhaValue(r) {
        return r.titulo || r.anuncio_indice || "";
      }

      // Returns dashboardData rows filtered by the current selections of the
      // OTHER fields, so each select only offers options that make sense.
      function qiFilteredRows(excludeField) {
        const lojaEl = document.getElementById("qiLojaAC");
        const campEl = document.getElementById("qiCampanhaAC");
        const prodEl = document.getElementById("qiProdutoAC");

        const lojaSel = excludeField === "loja" ? [] : qiACGetSelected(lojaEl);
        const campSel =
          excludeField === "campanha" ? [] : qiACGetSelected(campEl);
        const prodSel =
          excludeField === "produto" ? [] : qiACGetSelected(prodEl);

        return dashboardData.filter((r) => {
          if (lojaSel.length && !lojaSel.includes(r.loja)) return false;
          if (prodSel.length && !prodSel.includes(r.produto)) return false;
          if (campSel.length && !campSel.includes(qiCampanhaValue(r)))
            return false;
          return true;
        });
      }

      function qiBuildOptions(acEl) {
        const field = acEl.dataset.field;
        const multi = acEl.dataset.multi === "true";
        const selected = qiACGetSelected(acEl);
        const rows = qiFilteredRows(field);
        let items = [];
        if (field === "loja") {
          const lojas = [
            ...new Set(rows.map((r) => r.loja).filter(Boolean)),
          ];
          items = lojas.map((l) => ({ value: l, label: l, sub: "" }));
        } else if (field === "campanha") {
          items = rows.map((r) => ({
            value: qiCampanhaValue(r),
            label: r.titulo || r.anuncio_indice || "—",
            sub: [r.loja, r.produto].filter(Boolean).join(" · "),
            _loja: r.loja,
          }));
        } else if (field === "produto") {
          const map = new Map();
          rows.forEach((r) => {
            const key = r.produto || "";
            if (!key) return;
            if (!map.has(key))
              map.set(key, { count: 0, lojas: new Set(), sumReceita: 0 });
            const e = map.get(key);
            e.count++;
            if (r.loja) e.lojas.add(r.loja);
            e.sumReceita += Number(r.receita) || 0;
          });
          items = [...map.entries()].map(([k, v]) => ({
            value: k,
            label: k,
            sub: `${v.count} anúncio(s) · ${v.lojas.size} loja(s)`,
          }));
        }
        return items;
      }

      function qiACGetSelected(acEl) {
        return [...acEl.querySelectorAll(".qi-ac-pill")].map(
          (p) => p.dataset.value,
        );
      }

      function qiACSetSelected(acEl, values) {
        acEl.querySelectorAll(".qi-ac-pill").forEach((p) => p.remove());
        const input = acEl.querySelector(".qi-ac-input");
        values.forEach((v) => {
          const pill = document.createElement("span");
          pill.className = "qi-ac-pill";
          pill.dataset.value = v;
          pill.innerHTML = `<span>${escapeHtml(v)}</span><button title="Remover">✕</button>`;
          pill.querySelector("button").addEventListener("click", (e) => {
            e.stopPropagation();
            pill.remove();
            qiACUpdateClear(acEl);
            qiCascadeRefresh();
          });
          acEl.querySelector(".qi-ac-selected").insertBefore(pill, input);
        });
        qiACUpdateClear(acEl);
      }

      function qiACUpdateClear(acEl) {
        const hasSelections = acEl.querySelectorAll(".qi-ac-pill").length > 0;
        const hasInput =
          acEl.querySelector(".qi-ac-input").textContent.trim().length > 0;
        const btn = acEl.querySelector(".qi-ac-clear");
        btn.classList.toggle("visible", hasSelections || hasInput);
      }

      function qiACOpenDropdown(acEl, filter) {
        const dd = acEl.querySelector(".qi-ac-dropdown");

        if (dashboardDataLoading && dashboardData.length === 0) {
          dd.innerHTML = `
            <div class="qi-ac-loading" style="padding: 12px; text-align: center; color: var(--text-secondary); font-size: 0.8rem; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px;">
              <span class="ac-spinner" style="width: 14px; height: 14px; border: 2px solid var(--border-color); border-top-color: var(--color-primary); border-radius: 50%; display: inline-block; animation: ac-spin 0.6s linear infinite;"></span>
              Carregando opções...
            </div>
          `;
          dd.classList.add("open");
          return;
        }

        const items = qiBuildOptions(acEl);
        const selected = qiACGetSelected(acEl);
        const multi = acEl.dataset.multi === "true";
        const q = (filter || "")
          .toLowerCase()
          .normalize("NFD")
          .replace(/[\u0300-\u036f]/g, "");

        let filtered = items;
        if (q) {
          filtered = items.filter((it) => {
            const norm = (it.label + " " + it.sub + " " + it.value)
              .toLowerCase()
              .normalize("NFD")
              .replace(/[\u0300-\u036f]/g, "");
            return q.split(/\s+/).every((t) => norm.includes(t));
          });
        }
        dd.innerHTML = "";

        // "Todas" option for single-select
        if (!multi && acEl.dataset.field === "loja") {
          const allBtn = document.createElement("button");
          allBtn.className = "qi-ac-all-btn";
          allBtn.textContent = "📋 Todas as lojas";
          allBtn.addEventListener("mousedown", (e) => {
            e.preventDefault();
            qiACSetSelected(acEl, []);
            dd.classList.remove("open");
            acEl.querySelector(".qi-ac-input").textContent = "";
            qiACUpdateClear(acEl);
            qiCascadeRefresh();
          });
          dd.appendChild(allBtn);
        }

        if (filtered.length === 0) {
          dd.innerHTML += '<div class="qi-ac-empty">Nenhum resultado</div>';
        }
        filtered.forEach((it) => {
          const opt = document.createElement("div");
          opt.className =
            "qi-ac-option" + (selected.includes(it.value) ? " selected" : "");
          opt.dataset.value = it.value;
          opt.innerHTML = `<span>${escapeHtml(it.label)}</span>${it.sub ? `<span class="opt-sub">${escapeHtml(it.sub)}</span>` : ""}`;
          opt.addEventListener("mousedown", (e) => {
            e.preventDefault();
            if (multi) {
              if (selected.includes(it.value)) {
                qiACSetSelected(
                  acEl,
                  selected.filter((v) => v !== it.value),
                );
              } else {
                qiACSetSelected(acEl, [...selected, it.value]);
              }
            } else {
              qiACSetSelected(acEl, [it.value]);
              dd.classList.remove("open");
            }
            qiCascadeRefresh();
            // Re-open to update selection state
            setTimeout(
              () =>
                qiACOpenDropdown(
                  acEl,
                  acEl.querySelector(".qi-ac-input").textContent,
                ),
              0,
            );
          });
          dd.appendChild(opt);
        });
        dd.classList.add("open");
      }

      function qiACCloseAll() {
        document
          .querySelectorAll(".qi-ac-dropdown")
          .forEach((dd) => dd.classList.remove("open"));
      }

      // After a selection changes, drop selections in the other fields that no
      // longer make sense, and refresh any open dropdown so options stay in sync.
      function qiCascadeRefresh() {
        ["qiLojaAC", "qiCampanhaAC", "qiProdutoAC"].forEach((id) => {
          const acEl = document.getElementById(id);
          if (!acEl) return;
          const validValues = new Set(
            qiBuildOptions(acEl).map((it) => it.value),
          );
          const current = qiACGetSelected(acEl);
          const pruned = current.filter((v) => validValues.has(v));
          if (pruned.length !== current.length) {
            qiACSetSelected(acEl, pruned);
          }
        });
        const openDd = document.querySelector(".qi-ac-dropdown.open");
        if (openDd) {
          const acEl = openDd.closest(".qi-ac");
          if (acEl) {
            const input = acEl.querySelector(".qi-ac-input");
            qiACOpenDropdown(acEl, input.textContent);
          }
        }
      }

      // Setup autocomplete behavior for each .qi-ac element
      function setupQiAutocompletes() {
        document.querySelectorAll(".qi-ac").forEach((acEl) => {
          const input = acEl.querySelector(".qi-ac-input");
          const clearBtn = acEl.querySelector(".qi-ac-clear");

          input.addEventListener("focus", () => {
            qiACOpenDropdown(acEl, input.textContent);
          });
          input.addEventListener("input", () => {
            qiACUpdateClear(acEl);
            qiACOpenDropdown(acEl, input.textContent);
          });
          input.addEventListener("keydown", (e) => {
            if (e.key === "Escape") {
              qiACCloseAll();
              input.blur();
            } else if (e.key === "Enter") {
              e.preventDefault();
              // Select first highlighted or just close
              const first = acEl.querySelector(".qi-ac-option:not(.selected)");
              if (first) first.dispatchEvent(new Event("mousedown"));
            } else if (e.key === "Backspace" && input.textContent === "") {
              // Remove last pill
              const pills = acEl.querySelectorAll(".qi-ac-pill");
              if (pills.length > 0) {
                pills[pills.length - 1].remove();
                qiACUpdateClear(acEl);
                qiCascadeRefresh();
              }
            }
          });
          input.addEventListener("blur", () => {
            // Delay to allow mousedown on dropdown to fire first
            setTimeout(() => qiACCloseAll(), 150);
          });

          clearBtn.addEventListener("click", () => {
            acEl.querySelectorAll(".qi-ac-pill").forEach((p) => p.remove());
            input.textContent = "";
            qiACUpdateClear(acEl);
            qiCascadeRefresh();
            qiACOpenDropdown(acEl, "");
            input.focus();
          });

          // Click on selected area focuses input
          acEl
            .querySelector(".qi-ac-selected")
            .addEventListener("click", () => input.focus());
        });
      }

      // — Background loading for autocomplete options —
      function updateACDropdownsLoadingState() {
        const openDd = document.querySelector(".qi-ac-dropdown.open");
        if (openDd) {
          const acEl = openDd.closest(".qi-ac");
          if (acEl) {
            const input = acEl.querySelector(".qi-ac-input");
            qiACOpenDropdown(acEl, input.textContent);
          }
        }
      }

      function updateACDropdownsLoadedState() {
        const openDd = document.querySelector(".qi-ac-dropdown.open");
        if (openDd) {
          const acEl = openDd.closest(".qi-ac");
          if (acEl) {
            const input = acEl.querySelector(".qi-ac-input");
            qiACOpenDropdown(acEl, input.textContent);
          }
        }
      }

      async function fetchDashboardDataInBackground() {
        if (dashboardDataLoading) return;
        dashboardDataLoading = true;
        updateACDropdownsLoadingState();
        try {
          const resp = await fetch(OVERVIEW_URL, { cache: "no-store" });
          if (!resp.ok) throw new Error("HTTP " + resp.status);
          const raw = (await resp.text()).trim();
          let data = {};
          if (raw) {
            try {
              data = JSON.parse(raw);
            } catch (_) {}
          }
          dashboardData = Array.isArray(data.anuncios) ? data.anuncios : [];
          dashboardDataLoaded = true;
        } catch (e) {
          console.warn("Error loading dashboard data in background:", e);
        } finally {
          dashboardDataLoading = false;
          updateACDropdownsLoadedState();
        }
      }

      // ============================================
      // EVOLUÇÃO DO PORTFÓLIO & COMPARAÇÃO (PRD-2 & PRD-3)
      // ============================================
      let evolutionState = {
        selectedMetric: "lucro_total",
        selectedProduct: "",
        compBatchA: null,
        compBatchB: null,
      };
      let dashboardAlterations = [];

      function showAdChangesPopover(idx, anchor) {
        const existing = document.getElementById("adChangesPopover");
        if (existing) existing.remove();

        const changes = dashboardAlterations.filter(
          (c) => String(c.anuncio_indice) === String(idx),
        );
        if (changes.length === 0) return;

        const changeItems = changes
          .map((c) => {
            let icon = "⚙️";
            if (c.tipo === "preco") icon = "🏷️";
            else if (c.tipo === "investimento") icon = "💰";
            else if (c.tipo === "status") icon = "📊";
            else if (c.tipo === "novo") icon = "➕";
            else if (c.tipo === "removido") icon = "➖";

            return `
            <div style="padding: 8px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-color); font-size: 12px; line-height: 1.4;">
              <span style="margin-right: 6px;">${icon}</span>
              <strong style="color: var(--text-primary);">${c.campo || "Alteração"}:</strong> 
              <span style="color: var(--text-secondary);">${c.resumo || ""}</span>
            </div>
          `;
          })
          .join("");

        const popover = document.createElement("div");
        popover.id = "adChangesPopover";
        popover.style.position = "absolute";
        popover.style.zIndex = "10000";
        popover.style.width = "300px";
        popover.style.backgroundColor = "var(--bg-message-assistant)";
        popover.style.border = "1px solid var(--border-color)";
        popover.style.borderRadius = "8px";
        popover.style.boxShadow = "0 4px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.5)";
        popover.style.padding = "12px";

        popover.innerHTML = `
          <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 8px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-color); padding-bottom: 6px;">
            <span style="font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--color-primary); overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; max-width: 240px;">🔄 Alterações do Anúncio</span>
            <button id="closeAdChangesPopover" style="background: none; border: none; color: var(--text-secondary); cursor: pointer; font-size: 14px; padding: 0 4px;">✕</button>
          </div>
          <div style="max-height: 200px; overflow-y: auto;">
            ${changeItems}
          </div>
        `;

        document.body.appendChild(popover);

        const rect = anchor.getBoundingClientRect();
        const scrollTop =
          window.pageYOffset || document.documentElement.scrollTop;
        const scrollLeft =
          window.pageXOffset || document.documentElement.scrollLeft;

        let top = rect.bottom + scrollTop + 6;
        let left = rect.left + scrollLeft;

        if (left + 300 > window.innerWidth) {
          left = window.innerWidth - 320;
        }
        if (top + 250 > window.innerHeight + scrollTop) {
          top = rect.top + scrollTop - popover.offsetHeight - 6;
        }

        popover.style.top = top + "px";
        popover.style.left = left + "px";

        const closeBtn = popover.querySelector("#closeAdChangesPopover");
        closeBtn.addEventListener("click", () => popover.remove());

        const outsideClickListener = (e) => {
          if (!popover.contains(e.target) && !anchor.contains(e.target)) {
            popover.remove();
            document.removeEventListener("click", outsideClickListener);
          }
        };
        setTimeout(() => {
          document.addEventListener("click", outsideClickListener);
        }, 50);
      }

      async function loadAndRenderEvolucao() {
        const content = document.getElementById("dashboardContent");
        const loja = document.getElementById("dashboardLojaFilter").value || "";
        const produto = evolutionState.selectedProduct || "";

        let evoUrl = `${EVOLUTION_URL}`;
        const queryParams = [];
        if (loja) queryParams.push(`loja=${encodeURIComponent(loja)}`);
        if (produto) queryParams.push(`produto=${encodeURIComponent(produto)}`);
        if (queryParams.length > 0) evoUrl += `?${queryParams.join("&")}`;

        try {
          // Fetch evolution and changes in parallel
          const [evoResp, changesResp] = await Promise.all([
            fetch(evoUrl, { cache: "no-store" }),
            fetch(DETECT_CHANGES_URL, {
              method: "POST",
              headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
              body: JSON.stringify({}),
            }).catch(() => null),
          ]);

          if (!evoResp.ok) throw new Error("HTTP " + evoResp.status);
          const evoText = await evoResp.text();
          const evoData = evoText ? JSON.parse(evoText) : {};
          const batches = Array.isArray(evoData.evolucao)
            ? evoData.evolucao
            : [];

          if (changesResp && changesResp.ok) {
            const chData = await changesResp.json();
            dashboardAlterations = Array.isArray(chData.alteracoes)
              ? chData.alteracoes
              : [];
          }

          renderEvolucaoTab(batches, dashboardAlterations);
        } catch (err) {
          console.error("Error loading evolution data:", err);
          content.innerHTML = `
            <div class="history-empty">
              Não foi possível carregar a evolução de métricas.<br>
              <small>${escapeHtml(err.message || err)}</small>
            </div>
          `;
        }
      }

      function renderEvolucaoTab(batches, changes) {
        const content = document.getElementById("dashboardContent");
        const lojaFilter =
          document.getElementById("dashboardLojaFilter").value || "";
        const prodFilter = evolutionState.selectedProduct || "";

        if (batches.length === 0) {
          content.innerHTML =
            '<div class="history-empty">Ainda não há dados de evolução de batches suficientes.</div>';
          return;
        }

        // Filter changes based on active dashboard/evolution filters
        const filteredChanges = changes.filter((ch) => {
          if (lojaFilter && ch.loja !== lojaFilter) return false;
          if (prodFilter && ch.produto !== prodFilter) return false;
          return true;
        });

        // Dropdown options for product filter
        const uniqueProducts = [
          ...new Set(dashboardData.map((r) => r.produto).filter(Boolean)),
        ].sort();
        const prodOptions = uniqueProducts
          .map(
            (p) =>
              `<option value="${escapeHtml(p)}" ${evolutionState.selectedProduct === p ? "selected" : ""}>${escapeHtml(p)}</option>`,
          )
          .join("");

        // Metric Selector chips
        const metrics = [
          { key: "lucro_total", label: "💰 Lucro Total" },
          { key: "acos_medio", label: "📉 ACOS Médio" },
          { key: "roas_medio", label: "🎯 ROAS Médio" },
          { key: "ticket_medio_valor", label: "🎟️ Ticket Médio" },
        ];

        const metricChips = metrics
          .map((m) => {
            const activeCls =
              evolutionState.selectedMetric === m.key ? "active" : "";
            return `<button class="dash-metric-chip ${activeCls}" data-metric="${m.key}">${m.label}</button>`;
          })
          .join("");

        // SVG Graph
        const svgChartHtml = drawEvolucaoSVG(
          batches,
          evolutionState.selectedMetric,
        );

        // Trend KPIs (comparing last batch vs one before)
        let kpiHtml = "";
        if (batches.length >= 1) {
          const latest = batches[batches.length - 1];
          const previous = batches[batches.length - 2] || null;

          kpiHtml = `
            <div class="kpi-grid" style="margin-top: 20px;">
              ${renderTrendCard("Lucro Total", latest.lucro_total, previous?.lucro_total, "brl")}
              ${renderTrendCard("ACOS Médio", latest.acos_medio, previous?.acos_medio, "pct")}
              ${renderTrendCard("ROAS Médio", latest.roas_medio, previous?.roas_medio, "roas")}
              ${renderTrendCard("Ticket Médio", latest.ticket_medio_valor, previous?.ticket_medio_valor, "brl")}
              ${renderTrendCard("Total Anúncios", latest.total_anuncios, previous?.total_anuncios, "num")}
            </div>
          `;
        }

        // Summary Table
        const tableRows = [...batches]
          .reverse()
          .map((b) => {
            const dt = b.created_at
              ? new Date(b.created_at).toLocaleDateString("pt-BR")
              : "";
            const isoDate = b.periodo
              ? String(b.periodo).slice(0, 10)
              : b.created_at
                ? new Date(b.created_at).toISOString().slice(0, 10)
                : "";
            return `
            <tr>
              <td><strong>${escapeHtml(b.rotulo)}</strong></td>
              <td>${dt}</td>
              <td>${fmtBRL(b.lucro_total)}</td>
              <td>${b.acos_medio.toFixed(1)}%</td>
              <td>${b.roas_medio.toFixed(1)}x</td>
              <td>${fmtBRL(b.ticket_medio_valor)}</td>
              <td>${b.total_anuncios}</td>
              <td style="white-space: nowrap; text-align: right;">
                <button class="batch-action-btn" data-action="edit"
                  data-batch-id="${b.batch_id}"
                  data-rotulo="${escapeHtml(b.rotulo || "")}"
                  data-periodo="${isoDate}"
                  title="Editar data/rótulo desta planilha">
                  <i data-lucide="pencil"></i>
                </button>
                <button class="batch-action-btn danger" data-action="delete"
                  data-batch-id="${b.batch_id}"
                  data-rotulo="${escapeHtml(b.rotulo || "")}"
                  title="Apagar os dados desta planilha">
                  <i data-lucide="trash-2"></i>
                </button>
              </td>
            </tr>
          `;
          })
          .join("");

        const summaryTableHtml = `
          <div class="scope-block" style="margin-top: 25px;">
            <div class="dash-section-title">📋 Histórico de Rodadas <span style="font-weight:400;font-size:12px;color:var(--text-secondary);">— clique no lápis para editar a data ou na lixeira para apagar a planilha</span></div>
            <table class="dash-table" style="width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; margin-top: 10px;">
              <thead>
                <tr style="text-align: left; border-bottom: 2px solid var(--border-color); padding-bottom: 8px;">
                  <th>Período</th>
                  <th>Data Upload</th>
                  <th>Lucro Total</th>
                  <th>ACOS Médio</th>
                  <th>ROAS Médio</th>
                  <th>Ticket Médio</th>
                  <th>Anúncios</th>
                  <th style="text-align: right;">Ações</th>
                </tr>
              </thead>
              <tbody>
                ${tableRows}
              </tbody>
            </table>
          </div>
        `;

        // Automatic Insights
        let insightsHtml = "";
        if (batches.length >= 2) {
          const latest = batches[batches.length - 1];
          const previous = batches[batches.length - 2];
          insightsHtml = generateEvolucaoInsights(latest, previous);
        }

        // Alterações Detectadas panel
        let changesHtml = "";
        if (filteredChanges.length > 0) {
          const changeItems = filteredChanges
            .map((c) => {
              let icon = "⚙️";
              if (c.tipo === "preco") icon = "🏷️";
              else if (c.tipo === "investimento") icon = "💰";
              else if (c.tipo === "status") icon = "📊";
              else if (c.tipo === "novo") icon = "➕";
              else if (c.tipo === "removido") icon = "➖";

              return `
              <div class="change-item" style="padding: 10px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-color); display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px;">
                <span style="font-size: 1.2rem;">${icon}</span>
                <div>
                  <div style="font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--text-primary);">${escapeHtml(c.anuncio)} <span style="font-weight: 400; font-size: 11px; color: var(--text-secondary);">(${escapeHtml(c.loja)} · ${escapeHtml(c.produto)})</span></div>
                  <div style="font-size: 12px; color: var(--text-secondary); margin-top: 2px;">${escapeHtml(c.resumo)}</div>
                </div>
              </div>
            `;
            })
            .join("");

          changesHtml = `
            <div class="scope-block" style="margin-top: 25px;">
              <div class="dash-section-title">🔄 Alterações Detectadas nesta rodada</div>
              <div class="dash-alerts" style="max-height: 250px; overflow-y: auto; background: var(--bg-message-assistant); border: 1px solid var(--border-color); border-radius: 8px; margin-top: 10px;">
                ${changeItems}
              </div>
            </div>
          `;
        } else {
          changesHtml = `
            <div class="scope-block" style="margin-top: 25px;">
              <div class="dash-section-title">🔄 Alterações Detectadas nesta rodada</div>
              <div style="padding: 20px; text-align: center; border: 1px dashed var(--border-color); border-radius: 8px; font-size: 12px; color: var(--text-secondary); margin-top: 10px;">
                ✅ Nenhuma alteração relevante detectada desde o último upload.
              </div>
            </div>
          `;
        }

        // Compare 2 Batches side-by-side
        const compareSelectorHtml = renderBatchComparisonSelector(batches);

        // Render full Evolução Tab layout
        content.innerHTML = `
          <div class="scope-block" style="margin-bottom: 20px;">
            <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 15px;">
              <div class="scope-banner total" style="flex: 1; min-width: 200px;">📈 Evolução do Portfólio de Anúncios</div>
              <div style="display: flex; gap: 10px; align-items: center;">
                <label style="font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--text-secondary);">Produto:</label>
                <select id="evolucaoProdutoFilter" class="dashboard-filter" style="width: 200px;">
                  <option value="">Todos os produtos</option>
                  ${prodOptions}
                </select>
              </div>
            </div>
            
            <div style="margin-top: 20px; display: flex; justify-content: center; gap: 10px; flex-wrap: wrap;">
              ${metricChips}
            </div>

            <div style="margin-top: 20px; background: var(--bg-message-assistant); border: 1px solid var(--border-color); border-radius: 12px; padding: 20px;">
              ${svgChartHtml}
            </div>
          </div>

          ${kpiHtml}
          ${insightsHtml}
          ${changesHtml}
          ${compareSelectorHtml}
          ${summaryTableHtml}
        `;

        // Wire event listeners
        document
          .getElementById("evolucaoProdutoFilter")
          .addEventListener("change", (e) => {
            evolutionState.selectedProduct = e.target.value;
            loadAndRenderEvolucao();
          });

        content.querySelectorAll(".dash-metric-chip").forEach((btn) => {
          btn.addEventListener("click", () => {
            evolutionState.selectedMetric = btn.dataset.metric;
            renderEvolucaoTab(batches, changes);
          });
        });

        wireBatchComparisonEvents(batches);

        content.querySelectorAll(".batch-action-btn").forEach((btn) => {
          btn.addEventListener("click", () => {
            const batchId = btn.dataset.batchId;
            if (btn.dataset.action === "edit") {
              editBatchData(batchId, btn.dataset.rotulo, btn.dataset.periodo);
            } else if (btn.dataset.action === "delete") {
              deleteBatchData(batchId, btn.dataset.rotulo);
            }
          });
        });

        if (window.lucide) lucide.createIcons();
      }

      let batchEditTargetId = null;

      function editBatchData(batchId, rotuloAtual, periodoAtual) {
        batchEditTargetId = Number(batchId);
        const modal = document.getElementById("batchEditModal");
        const dateInput = document.getElementById("batchEditDate");
        const labelInput = document.getElementById("batchEditLabel");

        dateInput.value =
          periodoAtual && /^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$/.test(periodoAtual)
            ? periodoAtual
            : "";
        labelInput.value = rotuloAtual || "";

        modal.classList.add("active");
        setTimeout(() => dateInput.focus(), 50);
      }

      async function saveBatchEdit() {
        if (batchEditTargetId == null) return;
        const modal = document.getElementById("batchEditModal");
        const dateInput = document.getElementById("batchEditDate");
        const labelInput = document.getElementById("batchEditLabel");
        const confirmBtn = document.getElementById("batchEditConfirmBtn");

        const dataLimpa = (dateInput.value || "").trim();
        const novoRotulo = (labelInput.value || "").trim();

        if (dataLimpa && !/^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$/.test(dataLimpa)) {
          alert("Data inválida. Selecione uma data válida.");
          return;
        }

        confirmBtn.disabled = true;
        confirmBtn.textContent = "Salvando…";

        try {
          const resp = await fetch(BATCH_UPDATE_URL, {
            method: "POST",
            headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
            body: JSON.stringify({
              batch_id: batchEditTargetId,
              periodo: dataLimpa || null,
              rotulo: novoRotulo || null,
            }),
          });
          if (!resp.ok) throw new Error("HTTP " + resp.status);
          modal.classList.remove("active");
          batchEditTargetId = null;
          await loadAndRenderEvolucao();
        } catch (err) {
          console.error("Erro ao editar planilha:", err);
          alert(
            "Não foi possível salvar as alterações. " + (err.message || err),
          );
        } finally {
          confirmBtn.disabled = false;
          confirmBtn.textContent = "Salvar";
        }
      }

      async function deleteBatchData(batchId, rotulo) {
        const ok = confirm(
          `Apagar TODOS os dados da planilha "${rotulo || batchId}"?\n\n` +
            "Os anúncios desta rodada e as recomendações pendentes geradas a partir dela serão removidos. Esta ação não pode ser desfeita.",
        );
        if (!ok) return;

        try {
          const resp = await fetch(BATCH_DELETE_URL, {
            method: "POST",
            headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
            body: JSON.stringify({ batch_id: Number(batchId) }),
          });
          if (!resp.ok) throw new Error("HTTP " + resp.status);
          await loadAndRenderEvolucao();
        } catch (err) {
          console.error("Erro ao apagar planilha:", err);
          alert("Não foi possível apagar a planilha. " + (err.message || err));
        }
      }

      function drawEvolucaoSVG(batches, metric) {
        const labels = {
          lucro_total: "Lucro Total",
          acos_medio: "ACOS Médio",
          roas_medio: "ROAS Médio",
          ticket_medio_valor: "Ticket Médio",
        };
        const title = labels[metric] || metric;

        const width = 800;
        const height = 250;
        const paddingLeft = 60;
        const paddingRight = 30;
        const paddingTop = 30;
        const paddingBottom = 40;

        const chartWidth = width - paddingLeft - paddingRight;
        const chartHeight = height - paddingTop - paddingBottom;

        const dataPoints = batches.map((b) => b[metric] || 0);
        const maxVal = Math.max(...dataPoints, 0) * 1.15 || 10;

        const n = batches.length;
        const points = dataPoints.map((val, i) => {
          const x =
            paddingLeft + (n > 1 ? (i * chartWidth) / (n - 1) : chartWidth / 2);
          const y = height - paddingBottom - (val * chartHeight) / maxVal;
          return { x, y, val, label: batches[i].rotulo };
        });

        let pathD = "";
        let areaD = "";

        if (n > 0) {
          pathD = `M ${points[0].x} ${points[0].y}`;
          areaD = `M ${points[0].x} ${height - paddingBottom} L ${points[0].x} ${points[0].y}`;
          for (let i = 1; i < n; i++) {
            pathD += ` L ${points[i].x} ${points[i].y}`;
            areaD += ` L ${points[i].x} ${points[i].y}`;
          }
          areaD += ` L ${points[n - 1].x} ${height - paddingBottom} Z`;
        }

        let gridLines = "";
        const gridSteps = 4;
        for (let i = 0; i <= gridSteps; i++) {
          const val = (maxVal * i) / gridSteps;
          const y = height - paddingBottom - (val * chartHeight) / maxVal;

          let formattedVal = val.toFixed(0);
          if (metric === "lucro_total" || metric === "ticket_medio_valor") {
            formattedVal =
              "R$" +
              Number(val).toLocaleString("pt-BR", { maximumFractionDigits: 0 });
          } else if (metric === "acos_medio") {
            formattedVal += "%";
          } else if (metric === "roas_medio") {
            formattedVal += "x";
          }

          gridLines += `
            <line x1="${paddingLeft}" y1="${y}" x2="${width - paddingRight}" y2="${y}" stroke="var(--border-color)" stroke-dasharray="4" />
            <text x="${paddingLeft - 8}" y="${y + 4}" fill="var(--text-secondary)" font-size="10" text-anchor="end">${formattedVal}</text>
          `;
        }

        let pointCircles = "";
        points.forEach((pt, i) => {
          let fmtVal = pt.val.toFixed(1);
          if (metric === "lucro_total" || metric === "ticket_medio_valor") {
            fmtVal = fmtBRL(pt.val);
          } else if (metric === "acos_medio") {
            fmtVal += "%";
          } else if (metric === "roas_medio") {
            fmtVal += "x";
          }

          pointCircles += `
            <circle cx="${pt.x}" cy="${pt.y}" r="5" fill="var(--color-primary)" stroke="white" stroke-width="2" class="chart-dot" style="cursor: pointer;">
              <title>${escapeHtml(pt.label)}
${title}: ${fmtVal}</title>
            </circle>
            <text x="${pt.x}" y="${height - 15}" fill="var(--text-secondary)" font-size="10" text-anchor="middle">${escapeHtml(pt.label)}</text>
          `;
        });

        return `
          <svg viewBox="0 0 ${width} ${height}" style="width: 100%; height: auto; display: block; overflow: visible;">
            <defs>
              <linearGradient id="chartGradient" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
                <stop offset="0%" stop-color="var(--color-primary)" stop-opacity="0.2"/>
                <stop offset="100%" stop-color="var(--color-primary)" stop-opacity="0.0"/>
              </linearGradient>
            </defs>
            ${gridLines}
            ${n > 1 ? `<path d="${areaD}" fill="url(#chartGradient)" />` : ""}
            ${n > 0 ? `<path d="${pathD}" fill="none" stroke="var(--color-primary)" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round" />` : ""}
            ${pointCircles}
          </svg>
        `;
      }

      function renderTrendCard(label, val, prevVal, unit) {
        let pct = 0;
        let deltaHtml = "";
        let color = "var(--text-secondary)";

        if (prevVal != null && prevVal > 0) {
          const delta = val - prevVal;
          pct = (delta / prevVal) * 100;

          if (label === "ACOS Médio") {
            if (pct < -0.5) {
              deltaHtml = `🟢 ↓ ${Math.abs(pct).toFixed(1)}% melhor`;
              color = "#059669";
            } else if (pct > 0.5) {
              deltaHtml = `🔴 ↑ ${pct.toFixed(1)}% pior`;
              color = "#dc2626";
            } else {
              deltaHtml = `⚪ estável`;
              color = "var(--text-secondary)";
            }
          } else {
            if (pct > 0.5) {
              deltaHtml = `🟢 ↑ ${pct.toFixed(1)}%`;
              color = "#059669";
            } else if (pct < -0.5) {
              deltaHtml = `🔴 ↓ ${Math.abs(pct).toFixed(1)}%`;
              color = "#dc2626";
            } else {
              deltaHtml = `⚪ estável`;
              color = "var(--text-secondary)";
            }
          }
        } else {
          deltaHtml = "⚪ Sem histórico";
        }

        let formattedVal = "";
        if (unit === "brl") formattedVal = fmtBRL(val);
        else if (unit === "pct") formattedVal = val.toFixed(1) + "%";
        else if (unit === "roas") formattedVal = val.toFixed(1) + "x";
        else formattedVal = val;

        return `
          <div class="kpi-card" style="padding: 15px; background: var(--bg-chat); border: 1px solid var(--border-color); border-radius: 8px;">
            <div class="kpi-label" style="font-size: 11px; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--text-secondary); font-weight: 600;">${label}</div>
            <div class="kpi-value" style="font-size: 18px; font-weight: 700; margin: 5px 0;">${formattedVal}</div>
            <div style="font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; color: ${color};">${deltaHtml}</div>
          </div>
        `;
      }

      function generateEvolucaoInsights(latest, previous) {
        const insights = [];

        if (previous.lucro_total > 0) {
          const dProfit = latest.lucro_total - previous.lucro_total;
          const pProfit = (dProfit / previous.lucro_total) * 100;
          if (pProfit > 5) {
            insights.push({
              type: "success",
              icon: "📈",
              text: `O lucro total subiu **${pProfit.toFixed(0)}%** vs. a rodada anterior (de ${fmtBRL(previous.lucro_total)} para ${fmtBRL(latest.lucro_total)}).`,
            });
          } else if (pProfit < -5) {
            insights.push({
              type: "warn",
              icon: "📉",
              text: `O lucro total caiu **${Math.abs(pProfit).toFixed(0)}%** vs. a rodada anterior (de ${fmtBRL(previous.lucro_total)} para ${fmtBRL(latest.lucro_total)}).`,
            });
          }
        }

        if (previous.acos_medio > 0) {
          const dACOS = latest.acos_medio - previous.acos_medio;
          if (dACOS > 1.0) {
            insights.push({
              type: "warn",
              icon: "⚠️",
              text: `O ACOS médio subiu de **${previous.acos_medio.toFixed(1)}%** para **${latest.acos_medio.toFixed(1)}%**. Recomenda-se investigar campanhas com consumo excessivo.`,
            });
          } else if (dACOS < -1.0) {
            insights.push({
              type: "success",
              icon: "🎯",
              text: `O ACOS médio reduziu de **${previous.acos_medio.toFixed(1)}%** para **${latest.acos_medio.toFixed(1)}%** — excelente otimização de custo.`,
            });
          }
        }

        if (previous.roas_medio > 0) {
          const dROAS = latest.roas_medio - previous.roas_medio;
          if (dROAS > 0.5) {
            insights.push({
              type: "success",
              icon: "🚀",
              text: `O ROAS médio melhorou em **+${dROAS.toFixed(1)}x** (de ${previous.roas_medio.toFixed(1)}x para ${latest.roas_medio.toFixed(1)}x).`,
            });
          } else if (dROAS < -0.5) {
            insights.push({
              type: "warn",
              icon: "🛑",
              text: `O ROAS médio reduziu em **${Math.abs(dROAS).toFixed(1)}x** (de ${previous.roas_medio.toFixed(1)}x para ${latest.roas_medio.toFixed(1)}x).`,
            });
          }
        }

        if (insights.length === 0) {
          insights.push({
            type: "info",
            icon: "✨",
            text: "As métricas mantiveram-se estáveis na comparação com o último período.",
          });
        }

        const list = insights
          .map(
            (it) => `
          <div style="padding: 10px 15px; margin-bottom: 8px; background: var(--bg-message-assistant); border-left: 4px solid var(--color-primary); border-radius: 4px; display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 10px; font-size: 13px;">
            <span style="font-size: 1.1rem; line-height: 1;">${it.icon}</span>
            <span>${marked.parseInline(it.text)}</span>
          </div>
        `,
          )
          .join("");

        return `
          <div class="scope-block" style="margin-top: 25px;">
            <div class="dash-section-title">💡 Insights da Linha do Tempo</div>
            <div style="margin-top: 10px;">
              ${list}
            </div>
          </div>
        `;
      }

      function drawBatchComparisonTable(batchA, batchB) {
        const rows = [
          {
            label: "Lucro Total",
            key: "lucro_total",
            unit: "brl",
            lowerIsBetter: false,
          },
          {
            label: "Receita Total",
            key: "receita_total",
            unit: "brl",
            lowerIsBetter: false,
          },
          {
            label: "Investimento Ads",
            key: "investimento_total_ads",
            unit: "brl",
            lowerIsBetter: true,
          },
          {
            label: "ACOS Médio",
            key: "acos_medio",
            unit: "pct",
            lowerIsBetter: true,
          },
          {
            label: "ROAS Médio",
            key: "roas_medio",
            unit: "roas",
            lowerIsBetter: false,
          },
          {
            label: "CTR Médio",
            key: "ctr_medio",
            unit: "pct",
            lowerIsBetter: false,
          },
          {
            label: "Conversão Média",
            key: "conversao_media",
            unit: "pct",
            lowerIsBetter: false,
          },
          {
            label: "Ticket Médio",
            key: "ticket_medio_valor",
            unit: "brl",
            lowerIsBetter: false,
          },
          {
            label: "Saúde Média",
            key: "saude_media",
            unit: "num",
            lowerIsBetter: false,
          },
          {
            label: "Total Anúncios",
            key: "total_anuncios",
            unit: "num",
            lowerIsBetter: false,
          },
        ];

        const fmt = (v, unit) => {
          const n = Number(v) || 0;
          if (unit === "brl") return fmtBRL(n);
          if (unit === "pct") return n.toFixed(1) + "%";
          if (unit === "roas") return n.toFixed(1) + "x";
          return Number.isInteger(n) ? String(n) : n.toFixed(1);
        };

        const bodyRows = rows
          .map((r) => {
            const valA = Number(batchA[r.key]) || 0;
            const valB = Number(batchB[r.key]) || 0;
            const delta = valA - valB;

            let deltaHtml =
              '<span style="color:var(--text-secondary)">—</span>';
            if (valB !== 0 || valA !== 0) {
              const pct = valB !== 0 ? (delta / Math.abs(valB)) * 100 : 0;
              const isGood = r.lowerIsBetter ? delta < 0 : delta > 0;
              const isNeutral = Math.abs(delta) < 1e-9;
              const color = isNeutral
                ? "var(--text-secondary)"
                : isGood
                  ? "#059669"
                  : "#dc2626";
              const arrow = isNeutral ? "→" : delta > 0 ? "↑" : "↓";
              const pctTxt =
                valB !== 0 ? ` (${pct > 0 ? "+" : ""}${pct.toFixed(1)}%)` : "";
              deltaHtml = `<span style="color:${color};font-weight:600;">${arrow} ${fmt(Math.abs(delta), r.unit)}${pctTxt}</span>`;
            }

            return `
            <tr>
              <td style="font-weight:600;">${r.label}</td>
              <td style="text-align:right;">${fmt(valA, r.unit)}</td>
              <td style="text-align:right;">${fmt(valB, r.unit)}</td>
              <td style="text-align:right;">${deltaHtml}</td>
            </tr>
          `;
          })
          .join("");

        // Detecta rodadas com dados praticamente idênticos (possível upload
        // repetido / mesma planilha enviada em meses diferentes).
        const comparedKeys = rows.filter((r) => r.key !== "total_anuncios");
        const identicalCount = comparedKeys.filter((r) => {
          const valA = Number(batchA[r.key]) || 0;
          const valB = Number(batchB[r.key]) || 0;
          const base = Math.max(Math.abs(valA), Math.abs(valB));
          if (base < 1e-9) return true;
          return Math.abs(valA - valB) / base < 0.001;
        }).length;
        const nearlyIdentical =
          identicalCount >= comparedKeys.length - 1 &&
          batchA.batch_id !== batchB.batch_id;

        const warningHtml = nearlyIdentical
          ? `<div style="margin-bottom:12px;padding:10px 14px;border-radius:8px;background:rgba(217,119,6,0.1);border:1px solid #d97706;color:#92400e;font-size:12.5px;font-weight:600;display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:8px;">
              <span style="font-size:15px;line-height:1;">⚠️</span>
              <span>As duas rodadas têm métricas quase idênticas. Verifique se foram enviadas planilhas diferentes — pode ter sido feito upload do mesmo arquivo.</span>
            </div>`
          : "";

        return `
          ${warningHtml}
          <table class="dash-table" style="width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;">
            <thead>
              <tr style="text-align:left;border-bottom:2px solid var(--border-color);">
                <th>Métrica</th>
                <th style="text-align:right;">${escapeHtml(batchA.rotulo || "Rodada A")}</th>
                <th style="text-align:right;">${escapeHtml(batchB.rotulo || "Rodada B")}</th>
                <th style="text-align:right;">Diferença</th>
              </tr>
            </thead>
            <tbody>${bodyRows}</tbody>
          </table>
        `;
      }

      function renderBatchComparisonSelector(batches) {
        if (batches.length < 2) return "";

        const sorted = [...batches].reverse();

        if (!evolutionState.compBatchA)
          evolutionState.compBatchA = sorted[0].batch_id;
        if (!evolutionState.compBatchB)
          evolutionState.compBatchB = sorted[1]
            ? sorted[1].batch_id
            : sorted[0].batch_id;

        const optA = sorted
          .map(
            (b) =>
              `<option value="${b.batch_id}" ${evolutionState.compBatchA === b.batch_id ? "selected" : ""}>${escapeHtml(b.rotulo)}</option>`,
          )
          .join("");
        const optB = sorted
          .map(
            (b) =>
              `<option value="${b.batch_id}" ${evolutionState.compBatchB === b.batch_id ? "selected" : ""}>${escapeHtml(b.rotulo)}</option>`,
          )
          .join("");

        return `
          <div class="scope-block" style="margin-top: 25px;">
            <div class="dash-section-title">⚖️ Comparar 2 rodadas lado a lado</div>
            <div style="display: flex; gap: 15px; align-items: center; flex-wrap: wrap; margin-top: 10px;">
              <div>
                <label style="font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--text-secondary); display: block; margin-bottom: 4px;">Rodada A (Mais Recente)</label>
                <select id="compBatchASelect" class="dashboard-filter" style="width: 180px;">${optA}</select>
              </div>
              <div style="font-size: 16px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--text-secondary); margin-top: 15px;">vs</div>
              <div>
                <label style="font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--text-secondary); display: block; margin-bottom: 4px;">Rodada B (Anterior)</label>
                <select id="compBatchBSelect" class="dashboard-filter" style="width: 180px;">${optB}</select>
              </div>
            </div>
            
            <div id="batchComparisonResult" style="margin-top: 15px;"></div>
          </div>
        `;
      }

      function wireBatchComparisonEvents(batches) {
        const selA = document.getElementById("compBatchASelect");
        const selB = document.getElementById("compBatchBSelect");
        if (!selA || !selB) return;

        const renderTable = () => {
          const idA = Number(selA.value);
          const idB = Number(selB.value);
          evolutionState.compBatchA = idA;
          evolutionState.compBatchB = idB;

          const batchA = batches.find((b) => b.batch_id === idA);
          const batchB = batches.find((b) => b.batch_id === idB);

          const resultDiv = document.getElementById("batchComparisonResult");
          if (!batchA || !batchB) {
            resultDiv.innerHTML =
              '<div style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text-secondary)">Selecione duas rodadas válidas.</div>';
            return;
          }

          resultDiv.innerHTML = drawBatchComparisonTable(batchA, batchB);
        };

        selA.addEventListener("change", renderTable);
        selB.addEventListener("change", renderTable);

        renderTable();
      }

      // — Modal logic —
      function openQuickInputModal(defaults) {
        const backdrop = document.getElementById("qiModalBackdrop");
        backdrop.classList.add("active");

        if (!dashboardDataLoaded && !dashboardDataLoading) {
          fetchDashboardDataInBackground();
        }

        // Reset
        qiSelectedFocos = new Set(["performance"]);
        document.getElementById("qiObsInput").value = defaults?.obs || "";
        document.querySelectorAll(".qi-chip").forEach((c) => {
          c.classList.toggle("selected", c.dataset.foco === "performance");
        });

        // Reset all autocomplete selections
        document.querySelectorAll(".qi-ac").forEach((acEl) => {
          qiACSetSelected(acEl, []);
          acEl.querySelector(".qi-ac-input").textContent = "";
          qiACUpdateClear(acEl);
        });

        // Pre-fill defaults if provided
        if (defaults?.loja)
          qiACSetSelected(document.getElementById("qiLojaAC"), [defaults.loja]);
        if (defaults?.campanha)
          qiACSetSelected(document.getElementById("qiCampanhaAC"), [
            defaults.campanha,
          ]);
        if (defaults?.produto)
          qiACSetSelected(document.getElementById("qiProdutoAC"), [
            defaults.produto,
          ]);

        setTimeout(() => {
          document.querySelector("#qiLojaAC .qi-ac-input").focus();
        }, 100);
      }

      function closeQuickInputModal() {
        document.getElementById("qiModalBackdrop").classList.remove("active");
        qiACCloseAll();
      }

      function buildQuickInputPrompt() {
        const lojaVals = qiACGetSelected(document.getElementById("qiLojaAC"));
        const campanhaVals = qiACGetSelected(
          document.getElementById("qiCampanhaAC"),
        );
        const produtoVals = qiACGetSelected(
          document.getElementById("qiProdutoAC"),
        );
        const obs = document.getElementById("qiObsInput").value.trim();
        const focos = [...qiSelectedFocos];

        const focoLabels = {
          performance: "Performance Geral",
          lucro: "Lucro / Margem",
          acos: "ACOS / CTR",
          escala: "Oportunidade de Escala",
          problemas: "Problemas / Ralo",
          comparar: "Comparar Lojas",
        };

        const parts = [];
        if (lojaVals.length > 0) parts.push(`[LOJA: ${lojaVals.join(", ")}]`);
        else parts.push("[LOJA: Todas]");
        if (campanhaVals.length > 0)
          parts.push(`[CAMPANHA: ${campanhaVals.join(", ")}]`);
        if (produtoVals.length > 0)
          parts.push(`[PRODUTO: ${produtoVals.join(", ")}]`);
        if (focos.length > 0)
          parts.push(
            `[FOCO: ${focos.map((f) => focoLabels[f] || f).join(", ")}]`,
          );
        if (obs) parts.push(`[OBS: ${obs}]`);

        return parts.join(" ");
      }

      // Chip toggle
      document.getElementById("qiFocoChips").addEventListener("click", (e) => {
        const chip = e.target.closest(".qi-chip");
        if (!chip) return;
        const foco = chip.dataset.foco;
        if (qiSelectedFocos.has(foco)) {
          if (qiSelectedFocos.size > 1) {
            qiSelectedFocos.delete(foco);
            chip.classList.remove("selected");
          }
        } else {
          qiSelectedFocos.add(foco);
          chip.classList.add("selected");
        }
      });

      // Quick input event wiring
      document
        .getElementById("qiCloseBtn")
        .addEventListener("click", closeQuickInputModal);
      document
        .getElementById("qiCancelBtn")
        .addEventListener("click", closeQuickInputModal);
      document
        .getElementById("qiModalBackdrop")
        .addEventListener("click", (e) => {
          if (e.target === e.currentTarget) closeQuickInputModal();
        });
      document.getElementById("qiConfirmBtn").addEventListener("click", () => {
        const prompt = buildQuickInputPrompt();
        closeQuickInputModal();
        // Cada análise de campanha começa em um chat novo.
        startNewChat();
        elements.messageInput.value = prompt;
        elements.messageInput.dispatchEvent(new Event("input"));
        setTimeout(() => handleSendMessage(new Event("submit")), 50);
      });

      // Analyze button opens modal
      document.getElementById("analyzeBtn").addEventListener("click", () => {
        openQuickInputModal();
      });

      // Global Initialization
      document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", () => {
        console.log("🏁 DOM Ready - Checking Auth...");
        // Do NOT call init/startApp here directly. Check Auth first.
        checkAuth();
        lucide.createIcons();
      });
    </script>
  </body>
</html>
